zh.Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可凱特萊包
zh.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams是Lady Baroness Jane Heyward的女兒，於大約1480年出生在英國素福爾可凱特萊包。她於1500年與Thomas John Stebbing在英國素福爾可凱特萊包結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1526年在英國薩默塞特享年48歲。

zh-hans.Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可凱特萊包
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams是Lady Baroness Jane Heyward的女儿，于大约1480年出生在英国素福爾可凱特萊包。她于1500年与Thomas John Stebbing在英国素福爾可凱特萊包结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1526年在英国薩默塞特享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Ukrainian (standard transliteration Adamovych) and Belorussian: patronymic from the personal name Adam .
Americanized form of Serbian and Croatian Adamović, Slovak Adamovič, cognates of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams was born about 1480, in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England as the daughter of Lady Baroness Jane Heyward. She married Thomas John Stebbing in 1500, in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1526, in Somerset, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams est née environ 1480, à Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de Lady Baroness Jane Heyward. Elle a épousé Thomas John Stebbing en 1500, à Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1526, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams wurde um 1480 in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, als Tochter von Lady Baroness Jane Heyward geboren. Sie hat 1500 in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England Thomas John Stebbing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1526 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams è nata il circa 1480 nel Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England come figlia di Lady Baroness Jane Heyward. Lei sposato Thomas John Stebbing nel 1500, nel Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1526, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクケットレブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adamsは約1480年にイギリススフォルクケットレブルグでLady Baroness Jane Heywardの娘として生まれた。1500年にイギリススフォルクケットレブルグでThomas John Stebbingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1526年にイギリスソメルセトで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams(은)는 대략 1480년 영국 수폴크 케틀레버그에서 Lady Baroness Jane Heyward의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 수폴크 케틀레버그에서 Thomas John Stebbing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1526년 영국 서머세트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de Lady Baroness Jane Heyward. Ela casou-se com Thomas John Stebbing em 1500, em Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1526, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams родилась около 1480 г. в местности кеттлебург, суффолк, Англия. Её мать звали Lady Baroness Jane Heyward. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas John Stebbing в 1500 г. в местности кеттлебург, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1526 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Alice "Rannelegh" Adams nació aproximadamente 1480, en Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hija de Lady Baroness Jane Heyward. Se casó con Thomas John Stebbing en 1500, en Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1526, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
